name: Springans Pedor
name_jp: スプリガンズ・ピード
desc: You can Tribute this card, then target 1 "Springans" monster in your GY, except "Springans Pedor"; Special Summon it. If this card is in your hand, field, or GY: You can target 1 "Springans" Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as material. You can only use each effect of "Springans Pedor" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute this card, then target 1 "Springans" monster in your GY, except "Springans Pedor"; Special Summon it. If this card is in your hand, field, or GY: You can target 1 "Springans" Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as material. You can only use each effect of "Springans Pedor" once per turn.
eff: You can Tribute this card, then target 1 "Springans" monster in your GY, except "Springans Pedor"; Special Summon it. If this card is in your hand, field, or GY: You can target 1 "Springans" Xyz Monster you control; attach this card to it as material. You can only use each effect of "Springans Pedor" once per turn.

action: Attaches itself from your hand as Xyz Material
Attaches itself from your field as Xyz Material
Attaches itself from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
